CustomField.description: Contact's projected total income for the current calendar year, in whole US dollars. Entered by producers during quoting/underwriting to size coverage and premium. Whole dollars, no cents. Pairs with This_Year__c, which stores the year this figure applies to.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The contact's expected total income for THIS year (whole dollars, no cents). Example: 85000
CustomField.label: This Year Expected Income
